material_findings: The pending list contained two duplicate names already processed in earlier batches; they were de-duplicated rather than counted again.
authentication20210922last reports size 0 while authentication20210922vlast is 58834 KB; both remain separate until branch-aware history and tree comparison proves lineage.
SKYsaasV89320220525 reports size 0 despite strategic naming; no emptiness or archive inference is permitted.
HMSCodeOntime uses the nonstandard default branch HMScodeontimeproject and may contain health-domain data; branch inventory must follow repository metadata.
Three CPD Event Planner repositories report the same size of 380 KB; equal size and date-based names are not duplicate or canonical proof.
WytSkyDelivery20220120 and WytSkyDelivery20220122 differ by only 2 KB, but exact commit/tree/manifests comparison is still required.
